mapper.select:
SELECT id, plan_code AS planCode, production_line_code AS productionLineCode, production_line_name AS productionLineName, maintenance_category AS maintenanceCategory, maintenance_start_time AS maintenanceStartTime, maintenance_end_time AS maintenanceEndTime, status, creator_id AS creatorId, creator_username AS creatorUsername, creator_name AS creatorName, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM maintenance_plan WHERE id = #{id}
AND creator_id = #{creatorId}
